---
name: Bug report
about: Report reproducible incorrect behavior
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Behavior

Describe what happened and what you expected.

## Reproduction

Provide the smallest repeatable sequence, including relevant inputs and role.

## Environment

Include revision, browser or operating system, and deployment method.

## Evidence

Attach safe logs, request IDs, screenshots, or traces. Remove credentials and personal data.
